subcodes.title: Words to Arthur Agnew et al, spoken on 1907-04-13
subcodes.first_line: ‘Abdu'l-Bahá has written a Tablet specially for the purpose, that should anyone ask about his station, it is ‘Abdu'l-Bahá, and no more
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @unity of thought and belief, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
